mapper.insert: insert into employee( name, username, password, phone, sex, id_number, status, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) VALUES (#{name},#{username},#{password},#{phone},#{sex},#{idNumber},#{status},#{createTime},#{updateTime},#{createUser},#{updateUser});
mapper.update: update employee set status = #{enable} where id = #{id}

update employee
name = #{name},
username = #{username},
id_number = #{idNumber},
phone = #{phone},
sex = #{sex},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ID, NAME, USERNAME, PASSWORD, PHONE, SEX, ID_NUMBER, STATUS, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_TIME, CREATE_USER, UPDATE_USER FROM employee
